creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed as r391682.  USE_GITHUB should be revisited, but it should work for now.

For maintainership, please let me handle all of the Mozc related ports primarily.  They are tightly coupled and maintaining them by different maintainers makes things very difficult.  This should not prevent you (or other contributors) from submitting a patch and/or reporting a issue.
